title: Intense Shattering Italian Cinnamon Risotto
description: A pungent, shattering lazy-sunday Venetian risotto with cinnamon infusion and ice-bath shock for a crisp finish.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat and sauté diced onion until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in arborio rice and toast for 2 minutes, coating grains in oil.
Pour in white wine, stirring until liquid is mostly absorbed.
Add a pinch of ground cinnamon and a handful of grated Parmesan, stirring until melted.
Gradually ladle in hot chicken broth, one ladle at a time, stirring constantly until each addition is absorbed before adding the next.
Continue cooking and stirring for 18 minutes until rice is al dente and creamy.
Remove the pan from heat and immediately transfer the risotto to a shallow bowl filled with ice water to shock and halt cooking.
Drain the risotto, then return to the pan, whisk in butter, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, dusted with extra Parmesan and a light drizzle of olive oil.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
